items.headline: American Water Works (AWK) Stock After Recent Weakness Is The Valuation Still Justified
items.summary: If you are wondering whether American Water Works Company is fairly priced or if the recent weakness has opened up an opportunity, this article walks through what the numbers are currently saying about the stock. At a last close of US$125.07, the stock is down about 1.0% over the past week, roughly flat over the past month, and has declined 4.0% year to date and 9.1% over the past year. This performance may have some investors reassessing both its potential and its risks. Recent coverage...

items.headline: Is Recent Regulatory And Infrastructure Progress Altering The Investment Case For American Water Works Company (AWK)?
items.summary: In recent days, American Water Works Company has reported multiple regulatory settlements, infrastructure upgrades, and community programs, including revenue-supportive rate agreements in California and Virginia and completion of a major main replacement project in California. Taken together, these developments underline how American Water Works Company is reinforcing its regulated revenue base while investing in long-term system resilience and workforce development.
